title: NetworkManager bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 10.
description:
[1:1.52.0-8.0.1]
- Add connectivity check via Oracle servers [Orabug: 32051972]

[1:1.52.0-8]
- Support reapplying sriov.vfs (RHEL-113955)
- Fix removing unrelated OVS ports (RHEL-121105)
full_text:
[1:1.52.0-8.0.1]
- Add connectivity check via Oracle servers [Orabug: 32051972]

[1:1.52.0-8]
- Support reapplying sriov.vfs (RHEL-113955)
- Fix removing unrelated OVS ports (RHEL-121105)
